---
title: "Karman vortex"
description: "Description"
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas 
    url: https://github.com/pablo-mas/boltzmann-simulation
    affiliation: MSc student at ESPCI Paris - PSL
    affiliation-url: https://www.espci.psl.eu/en/
  - name: Jean-Guillaume Brasier
    affiliation: MSc student at ESPCI Paris - PSL
    affiliation-url: https://www.espci.psl.eu/en/

date: 05-18-2020
categories: [Matlab, Fluid mechanics, University project] # self-defined categories
image: karman-vortex.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---

# Karman vortex street

A report is available (in french). 

<style>
  button {
    border: 1px solid black;
    border-radius: 5px;
    padding: 8px 15px;
    font-size: 20px;
  }
  button a {
    color: black;
    text-decoration: none;
    filter: invert(0%);
    transition: filter 1000000s;
    font-weight: bold;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
  }
  button a img {
    margin-right: 8px;
  }
  button:hover {
    background-color: black;
    border-color: white;
  }
  button:hover a {
    color: white;
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
  button:hover a img {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
</style>
<button>
  <a href="karman-vortex.pdf" download>
    <img src="https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/482/482216.png" alt="PDF icon" width="30px">
    PDF
  </a>
</button>

<style>
  button {
    border: 1px solid black;
    border-radius: 5px;
    padding: 8px 15px;
    font-size: 20px;
  }
  button a {
    color: black;
    text-decoration: none;
    filter: invert(0%);
    transition: filter 1000000s;
    font-weight: bold;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
  }
  button a img {
    margin-right: 8px;
  }
  button:hover {
    background-color: black;
    border-color: white;
  }
  button:hover a {
    color: white;
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
  button:hover a img {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
</style>
<button>
  <a href="https://github.com/pablo-mas/karman-vortex-street"  target="_blank">
    <img src="https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2111/2111432.png" alt="GitHub icon" width="30px">
    Repository
  </a>
</button>
